recipes.title: Scrambled Eggs
recipes.instructions: 1. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper. 2. Melt butter in a skillet over medium-low heat. 3. Pour in eggs and stir gently until soft curds form. 4. Remove from heat while still moist.

recipes.title: Avocado Toast
recipes.instructions: 1. Toast bread until golden. 2. Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt. 3. Spread onto toast and sprinkle with red pepper flakes.

recipes.title: Pasta Carbonara
recipes.instructions: 1. Boil pasta. 2. Fry pancetta with garlic until crisp. 3. Whisk eggs and cheese. 4. Toss drained pasta with pancetta, remove from heat, and quickly stir in egg mixture with a splash of pasta water.

recipes.title: Chicken Stir Fry
recipes.instructions: 1. Cook rice. 2. Brown chicken in a hot pan. 3. Add vegetables and ginger, stir-frying for 5 minutes. 4. Add soy sauce and toss. 5. Serve over rice.

recipes.title: Grilled Cheese
recipes.instructions: 1. Butter bread. 2. Place one slice in skillet, add cheese, and top with second slice. 3. Grill until golden on both sides.

recipes.title: Classic Pancakes
recipes.instructions: 1. Whisk dry ingredients, then stir in milk and egg. 2. Pour batter onto a hot, greased griddle. 3. Flip when bubbles form and cook until golden.

recipes.title: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
recipes.instructions: 1. Boil pasta. 2. Sauté garlic and red pepper flakes in oil over low heat. 3. Toss pasta with oil and parsley, adding a splash of pasta water.

recipes.title: Tomato Soup
recipes.instructions: 1. Sauté onion until soft. 2. Add tomatoes and broth; simmer for 15 minutes. 3. Blend until smooth. 4. Stir in cream.

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
recipes.instructions: 1. Brown beef and drain fat. 2. Add seasoning and water; simmer for 5 minutes. 3. Fill shells and top with lettuce and tomato.

recipes.title: Quesadilla
recipes.instructions: 1. Place tortilla in skillet. 2. Add cheese and protein. 3. Top with second tortilla and heat until cheese melts and tortilla is crisp.

recipes.title: Tuna Salad Sandwich
recipes.instructions: 1. Drain tuna and mix with mayo and celery. 2. Season and spread onto bread.

recipes.title: Oatmeal
recipes.instructions: 1. Combine oats and liquid in a pot. 2. Boil, then simmer for 5 minutes. 3. Stir in honey and cinnamon.

recipes.title: Caesar Salad
recipes.instructions: 1. Chop lettuce. 2. Add croutons, parmesan, and dressing. 3. Toss to combine.

recipes.title: Baked Salmon
recipes.instructions: 1. Drizzle salmon with oil, dill, and lemon slices. 2. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 12-15 minutes until flaky.

recipes.title: Vegetable Fried Rice
recipes.instructions: 1. Sauté vegetables. 2. Scramble eggs in the pan. 3. Add rice and soy sauce; stir-fry on high heat for 3 minutes.

recipes.title: French Toast
recipes.instructions: 1. Whisk egg, milk, and vanilla. 2. Dip bread until soaked. 3. Fry in buttered skillet until golden.

recipes.title: Beef Stew
recipes.instructions: 1. Brown beef. 2. Add vegetables and broth. 3. Simmer on low for 90 minutes until tender.

recipes.title: Lentil Soup
recipes.instructions: 1. Sauté onion and carrots. 2. Add lentils, broth, and cumin. 3. Simmer for 30 minutes.

recipes.title: Egg Salad
recipes.instructions: 1. Chop eggs. 2. Mix with mayo, mustard, and green onion. 3. Serve on bread or crackers.

recipes.title: BLT Sandwich
recipes.instructions: 1. Fry bacon. 2. Toast bread and spread with mayo. 3. Layer lettuce, tomato, and bacon.

recipes.title: Chili Con Carne
recipes.instructions: 1. Sauté onion and brown beef. 2. Stir in powder, tomatoes, and beans. 3. Simmer for 25 minutes.

recipes.title: Chicken Alfredo
recipes.instructions: 1. Boil pasta. 2. Cook chicken. 3. Simmer cream and parmesan until thick, then toss with pasta and chicken.

recipes.title: Pesto Pasta
recipes.instructions: 1. Boil pasta. 2. Drain and toss with pesto and halved tomatoes. 3. Top with parmesan.

recipes.title: Shepherd's Pie
recipes.instructions: 1. Brown meat, mix with peas and gravy. 2. Top with mashed potatoes in a dish. 3. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes.

recipes.title: Sloppy Joes
recipes.instructions: 1. Brown beef. 2. Stir in ketchup, mustard, and sugar. 3. Simmer for 5 minutes and serve on buns.

recipes.title: Baked Ziti
recipes.instructions: 1. Cook pasta halfway. 2. Mix with marinara and ricotta. 3. Top with mozzarella and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes.

recipes.title: Roasted Chicken Breast
recipes.instructions: 1. Rub chicken with oil and spices. 2. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes.

recipes.title: Breakfast Burrito
recipes.instructions: 1. Scramble eggs. 2. Fill tortilla with eggs, cheese, and beans. 3. Roll and sear in a pan for 1 minute.

recipes.title: Meatloaf
recipes.instructions: 1. Mix beef, breadcrumbs, egg, and half the ketchup. 2. Shape into loaf and top with remaining ketchup. 3. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45-60 minutes.

recipes.title: Omelet
recipes.instructions: 1. Whisk eggs. 2. Pour into buttered skillet. 3. Add cheese and peppers to one side, fold, and serve.
